nasb.text: Now this is the enumeration of the sons of Israel, the heads of fathers’ households, the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, and their officers who served the king in all the affairs of the divisions which came in and went out month by month throughout all the months of the year, each division numbering 24,000:

esv.text: This is the number of the people of Israel, the heads of fathers’ houses, the commanders of thousands and hundreds, and their officers who served the king in all matters concerning the divisions that came and went, month after month throughout the year, each division numbering 24,000:

cnv.text: 以色列人各家族的首領、千夫長、百夫長和服事王的所有官長，都按著他們的數目分定班次，每年按月輪班，每班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 以色列人的族长、千夫长、百夫长及其他官长都分定班次，每班两万四千人，每年按月轮流服侍王。
